item.title: Did you know:Cats have an incredible homing instinct. Some lost cats have been known to travel miles back home, using a mix of scent cues and environmental memory! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #catdistributionsystem
item.description: By @1anirank1: Did you know:Cats have an incredible homing instinct. Some lost cats have been known to travel miles back home, using a mix of scent cues and environmental memory! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #catdistributionsystem

item.title: Meet Ryder, a paralyzed rescue cat who sits like a human. Ryder was found abandoned in a bag as a kitten, and does not have function in his back legs. Despite his disability, he remains in good spirits. He engages in typical cat activities, such as climbi
item.description: By @brutamerica: Meet Ryder, a paralyzed rescue cat who sits like a human. Ryder was found abandoned in a bag as a kitten, and does not have function in his back legs. Despite his disability, he remains in good spirits. He engages in typical cat activities, such as climbi
